pages.title: Factory Controller Block (Planned)
pages.text: $(bold)Concept$(): Centralized management for multiple PreFabs$(br2)$(bold)Features$(): $(li)Hold multiple PreFabs as items $(li)Unified ME interface $(li)Cross-PreFab dependencies $(li)Coordinated state management$(br2)$(bold)Release$(): Post-MVP (v1.1+)

pages.title: Advanced Filters (Planned)
pages.text: $(bold)Concept$(): Whitelist/blacklist items per face$(br2)$(bold)Use case$(): $(li)PULL only coal (ignore other items in chest) $(li)PUSH only iron ingots (keep byproducts inside)$(br2)$(bold)Release$(): Post-MVP (v1.2+)

pages.title: Wireless Linking (Planned)
pages.text: $(bold)Concept$(): Link PreFab faces without physical chests$(br2)$(bold)Use case$(): $(li)PreFab A output → PreFab B input (no intermediate chest) $(li)Directly transfer between dimensions$(br2)$(bold)Release$(): Post-MVP (v1.3+)$(br2)---
